hd71dbd07gf2e3g478ag8a32ga0450c684950: I can't afford to stay here forever. Time isn't on my side - or yours, for that matter.
h2240662fgae8eg49ebgb745g66cde45c758c: You're alive! I woke up by the wreckage, surrounded by corpses. I was starting to think I was the only survivor.
h9fe5a292g3262g4648gaf86gb1a52819ff28: Of course. I'd be stuck in a pod - or  worse - if it wasn't for you. Glad to see you're all right. Now maybe we can help one another.
h42f44702g540eg45e1g89adg0bb2b6867a84: We might be clear of those monsters' ship, but we still have their spawn inside our heads. We need to get rid of them while we still can.
h4b10d865g7d4eg4126g8e69g18ed30844d28: I'm surprised you made it this far by yourself.
h7cde478dg723dg4b55gb358gdee8baa9b214: I'm not helpless. Once I came to, I set out to find some means of surviving: supplies, shelter... and a healer, of course.
h4c9e14e2g9909g4a58g9408g30e5d428f40e: Seems you've got a head-start on me. What are you doing here?
hb644c0d9g4a1dg4830gbd0ag1f7941f6b974: This was the first sign of friendly life I came across. I hoped I might find supplies, shelter... and a healer, of course.
hbcc1ef89g890cg4863g92f5g5b70c1bc02c4: I thought I'd seen the last of you.
h8d919900g6469g43d6g9ffegb63a75dccd58: Start another fight, and I'll finish it.
h8adc0ff9g80a3g4ac9g8794gac49efea1f97: Take it easy. I'm not looking to fight you again.
h23aa848bgae51g4af9g9bb2gd1678d06d6ca: Then what are you looking for? Because it seems like you're following me.
hbeabc8afgc14eg4d37gbb9bgad8ec404af48: If I wanted a tail, I'd kill a cat.
h3c26b433g3ac6g43e1gadb4g68130082a4cb: I have more important things to do than follow you - surviving, for one.
h20ff4fb2g21bdg4557g9120g83d488b2a0ac: It's just a coincidence - I'm not following you.
h63cb2823g11c7g4d9eg970dg5b1634a6d93e: Watch your mouth - there's nothing wrong with tails.
h1891f1deg089ag44e7gb04egeb4662f79c1e: There's plenty of tieflings around. Easier to catch than a cat.
h674d841eg7b86g4b1bg851cg698cb6faa429: I'm not looking for hunting advice, gith. I'm looking to be left alone.
h035826bdgcd19g4c97g8798g985b831608a4: Calm yourself. It was a hypothetical.
h62a5cb8dge77ag4addgaf13g32795385b68e: Too many tieflings - don't cause trouble. Anyway, it was just a figure of speech.
h1b6289efg0e65g4436g9f27g44870e4f9847: It's a hypothetical. At present, I have no particular need to kill a cat.
h77aa16dcgf67ag42ffgaa4dg0cb7d20dc7a6: So again - what are you doing here?
hcdd59dacg69b0g48fag964dg5da2cf18246c: Fair point. Survival is the crux of it, for now.
ha0436bdfgb48ag4c23ga380g052ab2286fd4: I wanted to be among my people.
h4315bbefg9e23g4f0bg8efeg9e50a89c3741: The druids are supposed to be welcoming, and I could do with a little reprieve.
ha8da068cg7926g41fdgb982g7ef0a6289afd: Hmm. If you say so. Either way, there's still our little problem to contend with.
h7fac66b8g15c2g40b3g9412gda82cc0e434d: I've heard of cats. They are not worthy prey, even for the likes of you.
ha15b0c2eg8a41g4466g98b0g82d697f1c3e6: I do not know what this 'cat' is, but I doubt you'd fare well against any beast.
hd088568bg255ag45cbgab22gfd5e1926d6ba: Spit it out. I won't wait around here forever.
hfdabbe8fg2aa0g4511g9ca0g563e14b877e7: And no, I haven't found a cure for our little problem yet, if that's what you were going to ask.
h1ed1d02cgef41g4f40g9781ge74910f1188b: What are you doing here? Are you following me?
hbd41e295g40bdg41e2gbb8cgfadf695ac036: *She hastily tucks away an ornate box - one covered in ancient githyanki scripture.*
h0a80e022gd255g4436g9504g1d1e5cb3af36: *She hastily tucks away an ornate box - one covered in strange symbols you don't understand.*
h685a41deg3604g44e0g84b8gdf5c67157a37: I thought I made myself clear last time, gith - keep away from me.
h17410396ga8b9g41e5g873cg2eb1f54b0f4f: You show admirable spirit. We should be work together.
h7cdcaba5g0eb7g4e50ga250gd09064e06151: Just because you say it doesn't mean it's so. Now back off.
h8f9a327fgb7adg49a3g9e99g63e18e4857fc: I thought I made myself clear last time - lose the other gith, or there's nothing more to say.
h7d336366g68b7g4fbdg8f89g04e69b09ed32: I thought I made myself clear last time - lose the gith, or there's nothing more to say.
h5becc030g86f6g4b93g8bcdg50d6e3bc0d8c: Forget about Lae'zel. I sent her on her way.
h2b537138g0dc7g439dgb7e4gc397772c1af8: Hmm... I suppose we can talk some more then.
h9188fa17g5139g41f5g9a1fg366d2b15fbfb: You should reconsider. Wasting time here isn't doing much for you.
h91eb042bg2482g4c4fg9a67gd4fb664b6375: There's nothing for me to reconsider - you're the one with the questionable company.
h04ee6f45g30cag4ec4gb8e8gef4d08bca5dd: I told you already - I want to speak to whoever's really in charge.
h93e3fd64g942fg4e7fgbed1g721bc4f28c5c: Are you the one I should actually be speaking to?
h8d2ff0b8g1782g490egaf58g1565c1ce8347: *Suddenly you are pulled into her mind. You feel her frustration, caution, determination.*
h481e8751g1890g44c0ga45cg04405162db16: ...yes, you're the one. I felt it. I'm told you want company on the journey ahead.
h19b4f4c8ge5a3g4982g9205g7eb301b73da5: The name's Shadowheart, by the way.
h6c126452gf2f5g4975gbd6cgfa5760a2fac8: *Her attention is consumed by an engraved box that she turns over in her hands.*
h119fb9e1gb89eg4ba1g8b76g43678624b136: *The box is inscribed with glyphs similar to those used by the githyanki.*
h96ad1bbcg5c30g4ec8gb8e1ge22229eede97: A githyanki artefact - how did you come by that?
hcf8b3ad2g26bfg425cg86degc832625bfda0: Wha... ? You. You're one of them - the ones who were attacking the ship.
h250e9c24g035cg4957gad92g4bf4717eb25f: My kin's heirlooms are not to be pawed at by the likes of you.
hf36e71d4g69deg4ffeg929fge602182b653d: What...? You... you're one of them - the ones who were attacking the ship.
hb7bedbe9g56ebg4e5fgbf9bg142032ee412b: She was on the nautiloid, trapped in a pod. Greet her.
hc9c2c34egf432g4713g821fg3239a05d2908: You tried to free me. I couldn't get out until after the ship crashed -
hd0339d85g9cf7g4198g9193g2caa54d54237: *Suddenly you see what she sees. Feel what she feels. Confusion. Resolve. And a hint of gratitude.*
hcb37a75cg813dg47f4g97f4gbb79f5ef801e: ... agh! Did you feel that? You've got the same thing I do - in your head.
h07a1bfc0g38c1g462fg915cgcda985c0f0c3: You're no gith, at least. I could tell from being in your head.
hf5a96678g381eg48b5g89f4g2d5d6a7e3959: You're not fond of gith, I see.
hd58be21bgf5e8g4ef2gaff8g9fb8102e8b52: And you are? Those dragon-riding reavers tried to kill us.
hc8b9a6f9gd399g4a57ga771g562afcc790f0: Forget it. I've bigger problems than your poor choice of disguises. We both do.
hea307a4fga2b9g4b79ga8ceg729714652e33: There has to be a way to get rid of these parasites.
h2af8ecf1g2b3ag4db4gbc35gb6e9183de609: I need to find a healer. As do you.
h513d9370gf8b0g4ad2gbb2dgf85cad37a6ff: We should join forces. Better odds of survival.
ha8be48e9g3c3bg405eg9264g073ec5e3fb08: Or just company for our final moments.
h6dda0311g69ffg4698g8046gfdc12b7a28c0: But yes - you look like a better choice than a band of helpless refugees.
h3ef27f17g5f6bg4d25gbcd4g3ef726350050: I might've considered it... but your choice of company so far leaves a great deal to be desired.
h599c4150gae7ag4b4dg851bg43d6b7f627b3: Get rid of the other gith. Then we can talk about helping each other.
had2796c0gac20g494ag82c3g06e3cb0d8775: I offer you cleansing. You'd cast it aside for this shka'keth?
h7468d2d7g7e0fg438cgb9b8ge7a4e9f08fe0: Why the hells should I get rid of Lae'zel just to satisfy you?
h89f1aaaagf7a0g439ega214g5eef0c6b478e: Her kind can't be trusted - they just tried to kill us aboard that ship, after all.
h3801b1d4g57f2g4feeg8f15gf26d37f4b434: For your sake, you ought to nip this in the bud before she turns on you.
h36e00cb9g8b17g4c35ga7f8gc7f71f2b3f6b: If you trust me, then trust my judgement. We can help each other - all of us.
h7ad1ae69gc13ag43ffg849bg2e10816eb556: ... this is a terrible idea. You know that, yes?
hc001614cg4e7bg4bb9gb7f6gc5123fd8f1cb: All right, I'll come with you. I suspect you'll need someone watching your back.
h6bbc4061g4905g4754g8430gb5dc28c5413c: I saved you before, remember? The least you can do is trust my judgement.
hd3339db1g04d2g499bga17egabf856ee0179: We need each other. Besides, do you have any better prospects?
h3380e6edg9eb8g472bgb847g64ee18e9e8bd: This one is trouble. Watch your back, as she's likely to stab it.
h79b0a69fg5742g4d71g9804gf5a15b1c58b4: But I suppose you may have your uses. I can keep an eye on the gith.
h22bd7925ga591g482cgaaf9g8eef03f77adf: Introduce yourself as Gale and incline your head: ladies first.
h128e6b0dgf086g4ffeg8b10gee39068169f2: Lae'zel. Daughter of Gith. Warrior of Vlaakith.
hc5a32495g8f92g4a3ag9838gff8240b5a55a: I'm Wyll, the Blade of Frontiers. Living legend, in the flesh!
h47a8caccg1ff2g46a3g876agf75d3301c920: Uh-huh... Wyll it is then. Let's move.
he6d46d22g9adag4f07gb358g862616816263: I'm known as the Blade of Frontiers - but you can call me Wyll.
h56fb2d55g629bg42a7g89ccg77b15772ed4a: Very funny. And I'm a bugbear. We'll get along just fine.
h44859e40g163bg418cg9b22g56e246933acd: Wait. Perhaps we shouldn't. You're not the one I need to talk to, are you? Not really.
h9e760cd2g985eg4e47ga410g657d9aa636aa: I saw it, in your head. You follow someone else's orders. I'll deal with them, not you.
hd8ebc845g462ag4bd5g9462gcb517d401896: Wait - after all that, you won't join me?
h42d0c608gc0b4g4883ga7a6g2481830388f9: Oh I'll join you. If you have whoever's in charge alongside you. Otherwise, I'd best be on my way.
he04e0029g563bg42aag8ee1geb9139802311: I'll find someone you can deal with.
haed9594eg3860g47efg8b5bg1620b57d8b9b: You do that. I'll be here - for now.
hb231dfd3g8c7ag4a05gae98gd08e8d76f5b0: I've changed my mind. I'll take my chances without you.
h17bcaabagb695g4f82gbb39g99075d66d5e5: Fine, see what chance brings you. Perhaps we'll meet again. If you survive, that is.
h14e2cc80g8553g4169gbf0cg4634d2e155bd: You seem overburdened with hangers-on already. You'll just slow me down.
ha8d69c46ga3b2g4abcgaf78g9fe8f07ff0f2: Make your way to my camp. I'll see you there.
hbf22cb1egc995g46c2ga1deg4618a3b0f0e2: See me when you've cut the dead weight.
h0f9733e5g3ca9g417cg9336g11673e3bffdc: Before we go, I wanted to thank you, for freeing me aboard the nautiloid.
h6f162532g78d4g4db1ga771gb48c9a263275: It would've been all too easy for you to run right past my pod, but you didn't. I'll remember that.
h435ec202ga62dg46b5ga13bg1967520f24dd: Lead the way. But try anything suspicious and I'll kill you, understand?
hb5889573g4a49g4336gadf0g698d5e9fcc49: An extra blade's always welcome. Lead on, Wyll.
ha32b79aagd685g4042g8b2bgd9182bcb768d: Lead on then, Lae'zel. Up in front, where I can keep an eye on you.
hf6af180dg4c01g4064gbe13gc1f56fcec05d: Oh no, lead on Gale. I'll follow where the wind blows.
hc0726c09g929cg483cgb0bcg0868456a5e6c: After everything you've been through, my name gives you pause? Please.
hc7903373g317eg4f02g905bg50c3faa96065: Fine. Let's talk about something else.
h868c3a12g1550g4209gaee3gf662b2dc3e42: So, what were you doing before you got caught up in this mess?
h257e0e0eg323fg4be1g9616gb8883b703a2e: That... is none of your business. Let's just concentrate on survival, yes?
h3b585f85gcfcfg4313g89edg5bd27afac4b8: Have it your way. Time to get moving.
h170d6e16g5f3dg44eeg9ca3g6a252163021a: What do you know about these parasites we've been saddled with?
hcda959f5g1ddfg4fa8gaf1egd193b52553ac: Very little. Supposedly those monsters breed by planting their tadpoles in people's heads.
h71a62687gf7dfg46d2gaf17g94e2b0b7513e: Over time, the infected victim turns into a mind flayer.
h702e7c42gb528g4860gbff9g25a3b2573825: I have no idea how long it takes, but I'd rather have a cure sooner than later.
h9f131908ga3a8g40f7g90f6gdbefe1ca899e: My kind are rare in this world. What do you know of us?
h1916c602gcdcbg4169gb270g08bbdb763c40: I know enough to know I have to keep an eye on you.
h8748d50dg6743g468ag86bdgaab8a3000217: Interesting. Mongrel elves rarely have such enticing names.
ha461ee1cg88f6g4891g880ag937360d4b0cc: A name befitting the Underdark. Perhaps you have a little drow blood in you.
hbbce229fg16a3g4565g939fg25b12b90198d: My blood is the least part of me, drow.
h85ef5c4bgbb23g4dd3gb7d6g78cba30356ed: I heard you. So now hear me: raise a single hand against me, and I will slice it clean off.
h68993aa8gda4eg48a5g8323g9ac27ed56e1a: Save your breath - I'm going nowhere with you as long as you have that gith in tow.
h52debbd4gddd0g48e8g8c02g23189beff69f: If you play along for now, we can deal with the gith later.
h92baa746g4c50g40e0g8162gadd7d5b7ec62: This is ridiculous. We're done here.
he2f1ceceg9495g4f44g84f7gbe3df9eeaa59: Go on, then. Just don't be surprised when your friend turns on you.
h8ad4ae47g3a90g45f2gbeefg64bfb898b3f8: There must be a way for us to all work together.
h3858c1d5gedd9g47a4g93dfg08245c073145: Must there? You wouldn't expect a wolf and a deer to find a way to work together.
h7e4f26a5g45bcg4a85ga350g9ac3d02aa25c: I'm not going to just abandon my companion on a whim.
h5140d6b1g0bd3g4223g921eg0980948d4cc7: Fine, put your faith in a marauding freak. Just do it away from me.
h5432a9cfg2e9eg41b6gb9a4gedffb8a13db5: Why accept the company of one gith but not another?
h2c1704e7gf04fg4cf3g9bb3gefe3f9005e7e: You helped me - I think I can trust you. But her? She's trouble.
h54c38d1aga517g406egbad0ga4e79844a98d: Get rid of the gith. Then we can talk about helping each other.
h4651a28fgb2f3g408fg9229g98ab58f70c12: If we survived the crash, there might be others. Found any?
h04f19320g8735g420fgb967g8fbf63b0bd87: No, but I haven't looked either. Staying alive kept me busy.
hc9fb9a3eg09f8g4b0agac4ag931cf248d77c: There has to be someone around this place who can help us.
h1e0cef9cg7e45g4db8g81c1g1ef66540d7a6: This grove is the home of the druid Halsin. Apparently he's a reputed healer.
h5db6e756gf687g4196gacddga0043fd6ad95: He could probably help us. If only he hadn't gone missing.
hdaf5257bgf670g4323g8764g1f1a388a144a: What was that box you were playing with before?
hd347ff10gda4ag48f1ga7c9ga670847fe453: Why do you have a githyanki heirloom?
h22388cc9g4c5ag4bdaga36dgc38b71ad0190: Tell me what you're doing with a gith artefact - the truth this time.
hc24e889cgb164g4a6egb221gf3236b95f6c0: In my head? What are you talking about?
h1c26247bgcb62g47b0gbe15gcd0df839c49b: There must be a way to reverse what those tentacled freaks did.
h32e78dbfgec93g437ag8fccg50affcacc4ec: Did you just experience the same swap as me?
h07e6aab5ge2f4g4077gafb3g02d2345ef4a2: The same. It must be a side effect from what those tentacled freaks did to us.
h8520076cge83dg44ebg9143g341e793b60e1: Seems you're lucky to have survived. What brings you here?
habd7a377gae7bg45d2g8dfbg5e79b4f06d8e: Same as you, I suppose. Looking for shelter, supplies...
hc31da88eg1132g49f9g99fbg3b9ba5615abd: ... but I think we both know what we really need. Someone who can help with the stowaways in our skulls.
h8a7e53f3gb819g4f1dg8e35g85a3263aa88f: A healer, in short. Skilled. Discreet.
h3e96945agaa83g4de7ga489g58067504fc4b: *Suddenly you see what she sees. Feel what she feels. Anger. Bitterness. A will to survive.*
h2c42261fgbc9bg42fcgb4b4gf3e892ed9e60: ... agh! You've got one of those things in your head too. Can't run away from that.
h33dc1a6fg3697g4a2cgbff7gd4bc634d6a7e: There's nothing I could have done. I had to save myself.
hb2eee0ccg87aeg47c7g97c7g6720147aeb6d: How would you know? You didn't even try.
hc12167f2g910cg4a80g8e17g0667e3285806: You'd have proven a burden. Do not pretend you wouldn't have done the same.
h24addf29g92f7g426ag9a57g3c05ca386bca: I'm not the coward here, flatface.
h9445cd0egabb2g4d81g976cg2848ffcb65a8: No matter. We both survived, for now.
h3645ed3dg440cg4707ga921g6bb76f67c589: His duty was survival. You'd have done the same - do not pretend otherwise.
hdbafab68gd318g4dedgabd9g9adc36ea248e: Her duty was survival. You'd have done the same - do not pretend otherwise.
hbc7ed892g7363g4e0egaba4gcfbba3aae77d: I don't know what you mean.
h4c3502cdg9ab0g4edeg8d4egf19f839e005d: You know. You looked me right in the eyes, then left me.
h21e01b82gd669g461fg8d07gfb33a2be0013: That swap we just experienced - what was it?
hee751680g6ccag4fc5gb188g5f0b72a36e8b: Remember those things they put in our heads before you abandoned me? That's what.
h6211bddfg15cfg4b90g8823g251eea6f68d7: I'm looking for a cure - starting in this place.
hd76b7559gd14cg4ad5g9435g593f25a6b18d: You survived - let it go. Now what are you doing here?
hc620f1e3g8f75g49a4g98cfg722a1c137330: Keen to change subject, are you? You weren't so interested last time I tried to get your attention.
h28c3addbgdba2g4f65g9c76ge3f63b924b5c: I thought I might find shelter, supplies - even a healer, perhaps.
h915febfdgb6b0g4e71gb61fg747e7d9b061e: What...? You... you're one of them - the ones who were attacking the ship.
h621c6ddcgae28g46d7ga654g86eb84f91bec: I - what? You... you're one of them - the ones who were attacking the ship.
h0d818dfag95b1g4f5cgabf2g1666c619dc4d: *Suddenly you see what she sees. Feel what she feels. Distrust. Hostility. Because you are gith.*
h5b381a6aga054g4d5dgb6a7geb082f87871f: ... agh! No, you were on the ship, captive. I can feel the parasite in your head.
he970bd1fgf297g431cga5a2g04174f7583e8: And you ran away as I recall. Left me to die, trapped in that pod.
h9f0b2a73g6f5fg45a5g9f20g8ae2391aef04: Well, now you can run away again, gith. Keep away from me.
ha79c6a43gb152g40adgaf30g876ddd728f46: We're facing the same problem - is that truly all you have to say?
h774258edg66fbg4b36g9a62gf63b3bdb95b6: I can throw in a few more choice insults if you insist, but I'd rather you just left.
h8c54daa6gf00ag4bffg8a2fgc5a1b8b16af1: I've seen your kind's handiwork. And I won't fall victim to it.
hd459268dgdae2g4a77g9220g6ed2eb7eb7b8: I'm not with the gith who attacked the ship. You know that already.
h32c3742agb189g4807g8504gb241a38ae2db: Maybe I have other reasons. Regardless, stay away from me.
hbcbe62c7gdbe4g48c6ga15bgaee7f94a7111: I won't come any closer. Let's just talk.
hfc792fb3g039dg4aafg85b3g5941fceb1d87: Why bother with chatter? Our cure is at the crèche.
hf968f2f9g66c8g45e4gad4ag355e62b56aca: We can simply return in a few days, and take the box from the shell of her corpse.
h35f792c0gadf6g478fg876ag3b8d8e3e7648: No. It doesn't matter. I wouldn't trust your kind if a truth spell was stitched into your tongue.
h7c6c4228gbb21g4f0ag8881geeb0bfe2b0c1: I saved you, aboard the ghaikh ship. You owe me your trust.
hffe25652g47bbg4099gb0ffgc2a66775d10f: Lae'zel is right. A gith crèche might help.
h2962b6adg6670g4257gbb52g852af327d583: All right... say we found some miniscule patch of common ground... what then?
h39fb14c8gc40ag4800gb213g22f0be7a7d42: Then we focus on surviving - together.
hd470a2e6g3347g4802g9509ga4dca1201e66: I suppose you gith know something about these things...
ha090154fg5825g4e2bg8e91g6f160fa5e992: Fine. But understand that I'll cut you loose the moment I have to.
h3009ba3egf509g455agbb0eg61a23c5edaaf: Foolish. This whole place is on edge. Cause trouble and they'll turn on you - the outsider.
hb81bf584gb3b3g4c6fg8b23g097bdf6bfb46: This is foolish. We should be focused on solving our shared problem.
hdb86a1e2gbadbg4b36g97c3g6249400d3011: I've seen how your kind solves problems - with swords and dragonfire.
h86604977g9bc4g4c86ga530g81ef76835608: I suggest you hold your tongue before I slice it out.
h65b1cc76gd156g4447gb2bcg0c0a33000148: Lay one finger on me and you'll breath your last. I promise.
h1df1505fg99e0g4384g94dcge06b7dbb979d: I don't care what you have to say, gith. Back off.
h65797aa5g9eeeg4ebcg8346ge7c282d74400: It's too risky to turn your back on her. Attack.
h7edfe4a4g5915g4d65ga5a6g85c135010791: The parasite is the real threat. We should be helping each other.
h62ccf1b5g102fg461dga9ddged8435ca6c45: Keep goading me, and I will kill you.
h4d95097bge842g4fc0g9b83g75abdf4e9145: Try teaching me some manners then. See what it gets you.
hcabef0f9g8120g497bg9c69gc2a312ac92dd: Wait. We can just talk without going for each other's throats.
heee66697g391fg4981gba90g26ae136d4cd2: Tell her it'll be a short lesson, then attack.
hc8fdd2f5g3782g4dfcg8627g652395f60f67: Unless you're going to say 'I'll be leaving', I'm not interested.
hc5b2c39fgc54eg4e4bgaa1dg23224f2ede14: You're a fiery one. We'd make a formidable pair.
h326e47c4g707fg4cf9gb687gdda1d5854a71: And if I don't - what are you going to do about it?
h654f7460gfe48g4af1ga71dg0a57ea285a58: Not me - this place. It's on edge. If I raise the alarm, everyone will turn on you - the outsider.
h7223ab7cgf544g4fb2g8a48gdf84c62b0af9: You can always leave if I intimidate you.
hba4c402cgaaf8g4dccgadfbg93371239585a: Change your tone, before you regret it.
h16d11ea6g2033g4a5cg849egd8af58b8be19: Tell me what you're doing with that artefact belonging to my people.
h9e0cf12dg7d17g40c1gbbe2gbf733e462dbc: Some crude scratches in the metal doesn't make it yours.
hf03739fdg58a9g4634gb944gd6404d3b0191: Stay out of my business, and stay away from me.
h1ae7418fg7004g433dgb861gcbe7081a4d5e: I'm going to stay right here, just to spite you.
hd6873f27g5314g4530g9927g928519435d23: No matter. Walk away, gith. We have nothing to discuss.
h6e0ec46eg96d3g4e0ag8c8egbf6356161d10: *Suddenly you see what she sees. Feel what she feels. Distrust. Hostility. Because you look like a gith.*
hc4f72507g9136g48dega6b4g17b4b03c64b6: ...agh! You... you were on the ship. You have one of those things as well...
h2cbbeed7gea5ag43d4gabf2gb75b8ad6d107: ...why are you disguised as a gith, idiot? I could've killed you.
hde2c3211gfb96g45d0ga682g5c0435829d76: *Suddenly you're in her head, feeling what she feels - confusion. Frustration. Resolve.*
h6bd0edceg4794g4c60g89baga3580551f6e7: Agh! You... you were on the ship - and you have one of those things as well.
h2994e28bge1e2g4160gbfe6ge512bffd322d: Agh! You... you were on the ship - and you have one of those things as well.
h431204b5gc589g4e34g87e9gbcd84d35b04f: I suppose you came here for the same reason I did...
hc015254aga05bg4fa8gb328gf924f3286494: Oh yes? Maybe you suppose too much.
h67ce38caga2cfg49a2g8c6cgec4bc258ff6f: I don't think so. You need a healer, same as I do.
hcbfeb7eeg04f1g42a4g8811g005f6732a75b: But we'll have no such luck in this place, from what I've learned of it.
h64974b2eg73bbg4db5g8f0bgdaa49fe2d0a0: I'm here for anything that helps me stay alive. Shelter, supplies... allies.
h62ab5786gd23fg4d3agabc1ga283e1f332dc: Of course, but what you really need - what both of us need - is a healer.
h1ceb818agc118g4fc4g88f6g56614151f94f: Precisely. We need some who can help rid us of these things.
h341054cfge92cg4f1dgba2fgfa08f78104a5: I could crack open that little thing with one fist, if you want.
h21dff8f1g1733g4570ga55eg39e9afa2a3a9: I didn't ask for... you... you're one of them - the ones who were attacking the ship.
h2d6c6a1fg4789g4646gaebdg74f254fab75b: I didn't ask for you to -
h9333a6a7ge43dg43aag9108g4716cd59f660: Huh? You... you're one of them - the ones who were attacking the ship.
h57bd14a5g65aag4617g9f01g1721d2f0ad7f: *The box is inscribed with strange glyphs that mean nothing to you.*
ha52d2406g35f9g4938g9d79g175655a491dd: What's that trinket you have there?
h6e3cecdag4c26g498agb7a6g61c8fcb925b1: That's none of your... you... you're one of them - the ones who were attacking the ship.
